basis.target_market: Serious retail traders and prop-firm funded traders (FTMO, FundedNext, The5ers, Topstep). Global, English-first.
basis.pricing_model: Freemium. Free Forever plan: 4 journals, 25 trades/month, full trade logging, dashboard. Pro from $14.95/mo. Marketed as bundling features other journals charge $50-80/mo for.

ai_features.feature_name: AI Trade Coach / AI Review (powered by Claude Sonnet)
ai_features.ai_scope: Per-trade analysis (click 'AI Review' on individual trades for methodology-specific Wyckoff analysis) plus per-period pattern detection (revenge trading, tilt, overtrading) and per-portfolio dimension scoring (8-dimension performance score).
ai_features.ai_proactive_vs_reactive: Hybrid. Pull: user clicks 'AI Review' on a trade for on-demand methodology analysis. Push: Smart Alerts proactively detect revenge trading, tilt, overtrading 'before you see them yourself'; Telegram bot pushes real-time discipline alerts (e.g. position size above average after consecutive losses).
ai_features.ai_minimum_trade_threshold: Not explicitly disclosed; Smart Alerts 'evolve and become sharper as you trade more' implying gradual cold-start [uncertain]
ai_features.ai_underlying_tech: Claude Sonnet (Anthropic) for AI Review/coaching. AWS infrastructure, AES-256-GCM encryption.
ai_features.output_format: Structured per-trade text analysis tabs (methodology-specific), 0-10 setup scoring, 8-dimension performance scorecard, Telegram push alerts, in-app Smart Alert cards.
ai_features.notable_prompts: AI Review on a trade returns Wyckoff-schematic-aware critique (accumulation vs distribution success-rate context). Smart Alert example: 'Your position size is significantly above your average after consecutive losses — consider scaling down.' Detects revenge trading, tilt, overtrading patterns automatically. [uncertain] — exact prompt templates not publicly published.

playbook_depth.playbook_concept_maturity: structured-rules (leaning toward rule-adherence-scored). Trades are tagged by Wyckoff schematic type; each setup is scored 0-10 and tracked over time to see which setups produce edge. Prop-firm rules (daily drawdown, profit-split) are first-class structured constraints.
playbook_depth.setup_level_ai: Yes — setup-level AI is a core feature. Trades are tagged by Wyckoff schematic (accumulation vs distribution, spring, upthrust, etc) and the AI compares the user's per-schematic win-rate cohorts. Setup quality is scored 0-10 and tracked longitudinally, so the AI can answer 'which Wyckoff schematic is your actual edge?' rather than only per-trade critique. Methodology-specific analysis tabs render on each trade.
playbook_depth.rule_adherence_scoring: Yes — quantified. The 8-dimension performance scorecard plus per-setup 0-10 grading + prop-firm rule tracking (daily drawdown, profit-split, challenge phase) gives an explicit compliance signal. Tilt/revenge/overtrading detection feeds into the discipline picture. Specific named 'rule adherence %' metric is not the headline metric (unlike RizeTrade) [uncertain].
playbook_depth.pre_trade_validation: Not a headline feature. Smart Alerts can warn before/during sizing decisions (e.g. position-size-after-losses alert via Telegram), which is functionally a pre-trade nudge, but there is no advertised 'pressure-test this setup before entry' workflow with the AI [uncertain].
playbook_depth.playbook_template_library: Pre-built Wyckoff schematic tags ship out of the box (accumulation/distribution phases). 30+ pre-built CSV import templates for broker mapping. Custom strategies/playbooks user-defined.

privacy_stack.privacy_model: Vendor-hosted only. Claude Sonnet is called server-side by Wyckofflabs; no bring-your-own-API-key documented. AES-256-GCM encryption at rest, bcrypt-12 password hashing.
privacy_stack.cost_per_month_user: $0 (free forever tier) to $14.95/mo (Pro). AI coaching included in plan — no separate API costs to the user.

crypto_fit.crypto_perp_exchange_support: Strong crypto coverage via API auto-sync: Bybit, Binance, BloFin, Bitget, Bitunix, OKX, Deribit, Hyperliquid. cTrader bridge covers 300+ FX/CFD brokers + FTMO/FundedNext/IC Markets. MEXC not explicitly listed [uncertain].
crypto_fit.multi_asset: Forex, Crypto (spot + perps), Stocks, Indices, Commodities, Prediction Markets (Polymarket).
crypto_fit.partial_close_awareness: Likely supported via 50+ trade-form fields and API sync to perp exchanges that natively report partial fills, but not advertised as a first-class multi-TP concept on the marketing page [uncertain].
crypto_fit.funding_rate_context: Not advertised as fed into per-setup analysis [uncertain].
crypto_fit.gap_session_breakdown_per_setup: Partial: setup-by-schematic-type breakdown is core, and session/day-of-week analytics exist; explicit 'BOS+FVG: 62% WR London vs 38% NY' style automated per-setup × session report not confirmed [uncertain].

coaching_depth.coaching_depth_level: deep_pattern_analysis. The combination of methodology-specific Wyckoff analysis, 8-dimension performance scoring, tilt/revenge/overtrading detection with proactive Telegram nudges, and 0-10 setup quality grading moves well past surface metrics into causal coaching territory.
coaching_depth.psychology_metrics: Revenge-trading detection, tilt detection, overtrading detection, discipline scoring across 8 dimensions, position-sizing-after-losses alerts. No explicit Tiltmeter-style numeric meter named, but functionally equivalent.

community.community_driven_ai: No explicit shared-AI-templates or community-insights feature advertised; users get individual Claude analysis [uncertain].
community.changelog_ai_velocity: Actively shipped throughout 2025-2026 (Telegram bot, Smart Alerts, prop-firm tracking are recent additions); exact AI-feature release cadence not in public changelog [uncertain].
